bio: Sell your car in hours & Shop from 1000+ inspected used cars across Kenya. Transparent pricing, thorough inspections, fast payouts & easy financing.

posts.caption:
Seen a car you like but pesa haitoshi? Here's all you need to get #EasyGari financing together with #PeachCarsKe.
Kuja tuongee, hatuwezi kosana 😎
@easygari_group 
#carfinancing #financing #assetfinance #PeachCarsKe

Sometimes the right car isn't out of reach, the right financing partner is.

At Peach Cars, we connect you with trusted financing partners, including @easygari_group, making it possible to finance vehicles up to 19 years old.

Find the car you love, then let us help you explore financing options that work for your budget.

Ready to see what's possible? Talk to us today.
#DealCars #EasyGari #carfinancing #carfinance #assetfinance #peachcarske
